shared_attributes.design_principle: simple shapes, clear motion, temporary display

context.role: affection particle effect when Echo is petted, shows happiness increase
context.screen_position: spawns above Echo's head (x=64±5, y=40), floats upward
context.usage_scenario: spawns 3 hearts when player pets Echo, floats upward and fades out over 1 second, accompanies happy state transition

animation.description: spawns at Echo's head, moves upward 8-12px over 1 second, fades out in final frames, 3 hearts spawn with slight x offset (-5, 0, +5)

visual_specification.details: pink heart shape (#FF004D) matching Echo's cheek patch, 4x4px, spawns in set of 3 with slight horizontal spread, floats upward at 8-12px/sec, disappears after 1 second

relationships.differences_from: temporary particle effect (not persistent), motion-based (floats upward), triggered by player action (petting)

explicit_negations: no realistic heart shape (simple pixel heart)
no more than 3 hearts at once
